object: J^(0,1) - upsilon lanes alone (naming covenant: placeholder notation; no christening)
date_approved: 2026-06-10 (Will: Phase 0 ACCEPTED; Stage-A GO with rulings 1-3 applied below)
scoreboard: HR131 section-5 gap (primary driver); rows A4/A6 wave-two; Section-B leverage B3/B4
normative_law: RESULT_TYPES.md Amendment 1 (membrane pattern); the events tuple is the designated docking slot

rulings_applied.1_module_name: src/lloyd_v4/evals/bigraded_jet.py - placeholder infrastructure under the naming covenant; renames with the object when the name falls out.
rulings_applied.2_residual_pairs: division/sqrt upsilon-entries carried as exact residual pairs (r, b) / (r, s); structural exactness preserved; scalarized error values marked once-rounded BOUNDED.
rulings_applied.3a_kind_taxonomy: see upsilon_entry_taxonomy below; A-P1 grading is kind-aware.
rulings_applied.3b_twosum_default: unordered TwoSum (Knuth, CITATIONS E1) is THE default everywhere. Fast2Sum (E2) is permitted ONLY where the ordering precondition is PROVEN at the call site with the proof cited in-code. Stage A uses zero Fast2Sum call sites. Silent-wrong-residue is forbidden by construction.
rulings_applied.3c_frozen_battery: all batteries are pinned literal JSON (generated once via an ephemeral out-of-repo script, committed, hashed below) - never a seed.

FLOAT_EXACT.claim: true_op_result = fl_result + e exactly in the reals
FLOAT_EXACT.ops: add, sub (TwoSum, CITATIONS E1); mul (FMA TwoProd, E3); neg/abs (e = 0 identically)
FLOAT_EXACT.a_p1_grading: Fraction(fl_result) + Fraction(e) == exact real op result computed in Fraction arithmetic - ZERO gap, exact rational comparison (stronger than 200-bit; mpmath 200-bit cross-check recorded as corroboration)

PAIR_EXACT.payload: exact residual pair: div -> (r, b) with r = a - q*b; sqrt -> (r, s) with r = a - s*s; both r computed via fma, exactly representable (CITATIONS E4/E6)
PAIR_EXACT.claim: the residual r is EXACT; the normalized error (r/b, r/(2s)) is a REAL, not claimed as a float
PAIR_EXACT.a_p1_grading: Fraction(r) == Fraction(a) - Fraction(q)*Fraction(b) (div); Fraction(r) == Fraction(a) - Fraction(s)**2 (sqrt) - ZERO gap on the residual; any scalarization is BOUNDED and excluded from zero-gap grading

BOUNDED.payload: bound value beta with |true - fl| <= beta claimed from a cited theorem
BOUNDED.ops: scalarized PAIR_EXACT errors (one extra rounding, second-order, beta = u*|scalarized|)
BOUNDED.a_p1_grading: |Fraction(true) - Fraction(fl)| <= Fraction(beta) - bound honored, not zero-gap

UNKNOWN.ops: transcendentals (sin/cos/exp/log...): Python libm is NOT certified correctly-rounded, so the honest class is UNKNOWN (brief non-goal 2 option b); a half-ulp ASSUMPTION is never silently claimed
UNKNOWN.a_p1_grading: excluded from exactness grading; presence asserted (coverage honesty test)

precondition_flags.OVERFLOW_FLAGGED: any nonfinite intermediate in an EFT (CITATIONS preconditions) - typed event + coverage degradation, never a wrong zero
precondition_flags.UNDERFLOW_FLAGGED: result magnitude below 2^-969 - the theorem-true residual-representability sufficient condition (result exponent >= e_min + p - 1 = -970; CITATIONS E3/E4/E6 as corrected). The band (2^-1021, 2^-969) is input-dependent and flagged as sufficient-condition-unsatisfied: honest sufficient-condition gating. Typed event + entry degraded to BOUNDED (RN half-ulp).
precondition_flags.addition_underflow: no flag needed - Hauser's lemma (E10): subnormal fl(a+b) is exact

amendment_2026_06_10.classification: transcription-fidelity correction, NOT a retune (Will's review): prediction text unchanged; guard moved conservative; the error was a misquoted cited theorem; the A-P1 FAIL at the original pin (git history, commit 'A-P1 FAIL recorded verbatim') stays in the record as the stage's first finding.
amendment_2026_06_10.what_changed: UNDERFLOW_FLAGGED boundary 2^-1021 -> 2^-969 (above); CITATIONS E3/E4/E6 corrected with derivation + erratum; grader rebuilt with TWO-SIDED flag honesty (unflagged => exact zero-gap; flagged => sufficient condition genuinely unsatisfied; MISSING_FLAG only for unflagged violations; flag counts reported in prediction_verdicts).
amendment_2026_06_10.independently_verified: Will, on-host: sqrt(1e-300) s^2 exp -997 normal, true residual needs 2^-1102 < 2^-1074 floor; FMA residual != exact in rationals while printing identically; control at 2^-100 exact; (2^-540)^2 underflow-to-zero confirmed.
amendment_2026_06_10.a_p3_exceeding_observation: A-P3's exact-Fraction equality (value (+) residues == TRUE result) held on ALL cases at ALL cond levels - an observation EXCEEDING the registered prediction, labeled as such; reported, not retro-claimed.

predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P1: for every EXACT-covered op in the frozen battery, value (+) residue reconstructed at 200-bit precision equals the true real-arithmetic result of that operation with zero gap; every precondition violation (overflow, subnormal-edge) emits a typed flag - no silent wrong zeros.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P2: 100% of in-precondition subtraction residues pass the BACL membership check; Conjecture-C / c2 invariants hold on the frozen boundary set.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P3: lane-built compensated summation/dot reproduces the ORO reference results on the cited battery - equal to the 200-bit-truth-rounded-to-double wherever cond*u^2 << 1, per the cited theorem, with the campaign reporting the measured boundary.

prediction_grading_mechanical.A-P1: per battery case x op: kind-aware zero-gap rule from upsilon_entry_taxonomy (exact Fraction comparisons; 200-bit mpmath corroboration recorded). PASS iff every in-precondition case reconstructs with zero gap AND every flagged case (overflow_expected/underflow_expected in the battery) carries its typed flag AND no unflagged precondition violation exists.
prediction_grading_mechanical.A-P2: BACL: for each battery pair (a,b) with a,b in F+, ulp(a)>=ulp(b): TwoSum subtraction residue e of fl(a-b) satisfies Fraction(e) % Fraction(ulp(b)) == 0 (membership via exact rationals). PASS iff 100%. Conjecture-C: for each c2-battery f in [2^k, 2^(k+1)): R = fl(sqrt(f)) (lane op), check fl(R*R) >= 2^k. c2 corollary: sqrt round-trip residual j-multiple with |j| <= 1 on the same battery, j extracted from the upsilon-lanes. PASS iff both invariant sets hold 100%.
prediction_grading_mechanical.A-P3: Sum2/Dot2 BUILT FROM THE LANES (values + lane residue accumulation, ORO Algorithm 4.1/5.3 structure) on the frozen batteries: result == float(200-bit truth) for every case with measured_cond * u^2 < 0.01; for all cases the measured error and cond recorded; the empirical accuracy boundary reported (not asserted). PASS iff the low-cond equality holds universally and no case contradicts the cited cond*u^2 law by more than the theorem's own constant.

platform_route: math.fma PRESENT in Python 3.14.4, verified true-fused (Phase 0). FMA route for TwoProd/div/sqrt residuals. Dekker splitting (E5) documented dead-code fallback.
membrane: Amendment 1 obligations 1-6 binding; operation_id 'bigraded_jet_upsilon' registered in the eval-tier ledger citing this brief; module-local UpsilonStatus family; one TypedResult per evaluation; events tuple = docking slot.
determinism_policy: inherited verbatim (zero RNG at runtime; batteries are literals; canonical JSONL; byte-stable re-runs).

commands.green_slice: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_bigraded_upsilon_exactness.py tests/test_bigraded_theorem_oracles.py tests/test_bigraded_oro_battery.py tests/test_bigraded_membrane.py
commands.source_audit: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_source_purity.py && frozen-token grep (HR131 list, unchanged) over src/lloyd_v4/evals/bigraded_jet.py

names_that_fell_out: collected in the Stage-A report only - never adopted (covenant)
